CustomField.description: Should auto create relationship maps for CRUSH Account Plans
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If checked, then it will auto create relationship maps for account plans, if unchecked it will not. (Note that there are currently no ways to manually create a map from inside the plan, so only uncheck if you are creating through some sort of automation, or just don't want relationship maps on your account plans)
CustomField.label: Auto Create Stakeholder Maps
